sentences.translation: Otvorio je aplikaciju kalendara da se sjeti termina.
sentences.translationEn: He opened the calendar app to remember the appointments.

sentences.translation: Dodao je sve termine u aplikaciju.
sentences.translationEn: He added all his appointments in the app.

sentences.arabic: قَرَّرَ أَنْ يَسْتَخْدِمَ التَّطْبِيقَ دَائِمًا حَتَّى لَا يَنْسَى.
sentences.translation: Odlučio je uvijek koristiti aplikaciju da ne zaboravlja.
sentences.translationEn: He decided to always use the app so he would not forget.
